name: Mike Mikus
subject: New poll: Katie's ahead by 3
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
| JUST-RELEASED POLL: Katie's in the lead!
Katie McGinty 37 / Joe Sestak 34
[**This race is razor-thin: Donate NOW so Katie wins on Tuesday >> **](https://act.myngp.com/el/8944564595612188672/-3435660475986083840?refcode=e20160421&refcode2=e20160421nd&amount=25)
---
Friend, I had to share this amazing news ASAP:
**The latest poll released just this morning by Garin-Hart-Yang Research Group has Katie up 3 points over our primary opponent.**

[**We can 't let our razor-thin lead slip: RUSH an urgent donation to Katie right now. This race will come down to the wire, and Katie needs us now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8944564595612188672/-3435660475986083840?refcode=e20160421&refcode2=e20160421nd&amount=25)

We've been steadily gaining in the polls for months, and your hard work is paying off.

This is the first poll of the campaign that has Katie leading the pack -- and just five days before our primary election, it couldn't have come at a better time.

**Our race is as close as they come: Katie can and will win on Primary Day, but only if we keep fighting together.**

[**If you 've been waiting to donate to Katie, there's never been a better time to make your gift count. Rush your first donation to Katie today so she can maintain her lead and win on Tuesday.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8944564595612188672/-3435660475986083840?refcode=e20160421&refcode2=e20160421nd&amount=25)

Let's win this,

Mike Mikus
Campaign Manager
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8944564595612188672/-3435660475986083840?refcode=e20160421&refcode2=e20160421nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: 4 days left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donna Edwards for Senate
body:
Friend,
Republicans in the Senate have taken their obstruction to a new low.
And it's clear the only way we can make progress -- and confirm a new Supreme Court Justice -- is to take back the Senate. **That starts by holding this Democratic seat in Maryland with a true progressive like Donna.**
But she is under attack and is being outspent on the airwaves in some places almost 7-1. **Just 4 days left until Election Day -- if you want her progressive voice in the Senate you need to give all you can now so she can win this primary:**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Express Donate: $5](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feffa9/767134fb/5c493457/43380b9e/3512573810/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiZG9ubmFlZHdhcmRzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTIwMTYwNDIxQU0tTkQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVVGeWNtRjVRU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/donnaedwards_email?refcode=em20160421AM-ND&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")**

**[Express Donate: $50](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feffa9/767134fb/5c493457/43380b9c/3512573810/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiZG9ubmFlZHdhcmRzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTIwMTYwNDIxQU0tTkQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVVGeWNtRjVReUI5ZlE9PSI6IjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/donnaedwards_email?refcode=em20160421AM-ND&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Express Donate: $100](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feffa9/767134fb/5c493457/43380b9d/3512573810/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiZG9ubmFlZHdhcmRzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTIwMTYwNDIxQU0tTkQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVVGeWNtRjVSQ0I5ZlE9PSI6IjEwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/donnaedwards_email?refcode=em20160421AM-ND&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=100")**
**[Donate Another Amount](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feffa9/767134fb/5c493457/43380b9a/3512573810/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiZG9ubmFlZHdhcmRzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTIwMTYwNDIxQU0tTkQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/donnaedwards_email?refcode=em20160421AM-ND&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
We have a chance in 2016 to build a progressive, Democratic majority in the Senate and elect a record number of women. **All of this is within our grasp -- but we have to fight for it, friend.**
There's too much at stake -- voting rights, workers' rights, a woman's right to choose -- to sit back.
Give $5 right now and make sure Donna has the resources she needs for the final push:

Kirsten Gillibrand
[](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feffa9/767134fb/5c493457/43380b9a/3512573810/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiZG9ubmFlZHdhcmRzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTIwMTYwNDIxQU0tTkQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/donnaedwards_email?refcode=em20160421AM-ND&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

If you would like to receive less email, please [click here](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feffa9/767134fb/5c493457/43380b9b/3512573810/VEsO/ "http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/s/receive-less-email"). If you would like to contribute to Donna's campaign to be Maryland's next Senator [click here.](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feffa9/767134fb/5c493457/43380b98/3512573810/VEsP/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaWDE5IjoiZW0yMDE2MDQyMUFNLU5EIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dfesplash?refcode=footer_em20160421AM-ND") If you want to learn more about Donna, please visit [www.donnaedwardsforsenate.com](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feffa9/767134fb/5c493457/43380b99/3512573810/VEsHBQ/ "http://donnaedwardsforsenate.com"). Email is the best way to stay in contact with supporters like you, but if you wish to unsubscribe from all emails from the Donna Edwards for Senate Campaign, please [click here.](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feffa9/767134fb/5c493457/43380b96/3512573810/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: John Weaver, Chief Strategist
subject: Thank you, Hillary
body:
Compliments are rare in politics but the Democrats have a funny
way of complimenting Gov. John Kasich yesterday.

Peter - compliments are rare in
politics but the Democrats have a funny way of complimenting Gov.
John Kasich.
The Democrat National Committee,
which LOVES Hillary Clinton (just ask Bernie Sanders), launched
an attack against us yesterday urging Gov. Kasich to get out of
the race.
Hmmmm I wonder why they'd be
doing this?

Could it be the 15 polls in a row
that show John Kasich is the ONLY Republican who can defeat
Hillary Clinton?
This is why it's so critical that
we continue marching forward, deny Trump the delegates he'll need
to win and head into a contested convention with the momentum
we'll need to unify the party behind Gov. John Kasich.
If you agree, help with our
critical fundraising goal of raising another $32,600 by Friday
evening!

>> CHIP IN $25 <<

>> CHIP IN $50 <<

>> CHIP IN $100 <<

>> CHIP IN $250 <<

We have five more primaries on
Tuesday and most polls show us in a strong second place in great
position to deny Trump delegates.
Just yesterday, we provided the
#NeverTrump folks with a roadmap to follow if they're serious
about stopping Trump. It's not too late!
Thank you for all that you're
doing to help the campaign.
John Weaver
Chief Strategist
JohnKasich.com

DONATE

Paid for by Kasich
for America
www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.

http://email.sermodigital.com/p/iWJHY35CNe

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Joe Sestak
subject: Poll: Up 6 with 5 days to go!
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719809/3476a20e/d947043/27426621/1273243482/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, **this morning 's Franklin and Marshall Poll has us 6 points up** with only 5 days to the primary - _despite the $4.2 million of Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC) and other outside interest groups ' attack ads!_ | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719809/3476a20e/d947043/27426620/1273243482/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0421FB1b1&amounts=6,60,600")
---

People are truly tired of Washington DC power politics that considers them irrelevant.
I need you, as DSCC's power is their money and I am now out funded 2.8 to 1 in the homestretch. I am asking you today to sustain our lead by [**contributing now $6, $60, $600 (!) - frankly, whatever you can afford!**](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719809/3476a20e/d947043/2742662f/1273243482/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0421FB1p1&amounts=6,60,600")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719809/3476a20e/d947043/2742662e/1273243482/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0421FB1b2&amounts=6,60,600")
---

I thank you, so much, for your belief in me ... Thank you for having my 6, so I can have yours!

Warmly,
Joe

| [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719809/3476a20e/d947043/2742662d/1273243482/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/joesestak")[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719809/3476a20e/d947043/2742662c/1273243482/VEsA/ "https://twitter.com/joesestak")

Media, PA 19063

name: Corry Bliss
subject: This Saturday
body:
| Peter -- During the primary, Ted Strickland's low energy campaign was called "invisible" and "ghost" like for refusing to talk about the issues. Since the primary, nothing has changed. Ted Strickland is hiding from his record. As governor, he oversaw the loss of more than 350,000 jobs and Ohio ranked 48th in job creation. Now he's hiding from his weak record on China. You can learn more about his long record of refusing to hold China accountable by visiting [WeakOnChina.com](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.weakonchina.com&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ssapril3&n=1).

This Saturday, Rob will make more public appearances in one day than Ted has made in the last month.

On our second Super Saturday day of grassroots action, we've set a goal of contacting more than 50,000 voters in a single day! Rob and Jane will crisscross the state meeting with voters and talking with our interns and volunteers. [Have you RSVPed](http://www.robportman.com/super_saturday_april?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ssapril3&n=2)?

**[](http://www.robportman.com/super_saturday_april?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ssapril3&n=3)**
Since May 1st of last year, our incredible volunteers and interns have contacted more than 1.6 million voters and we're just getting started. This Saturday, we'll have special guests, including Congressmen and statewide elected officials, at all of our offices. While Ted Strickland rarely makes public appearances, Rob and Jane will making their away across the state this Saturday, April 23rd. [You can RSVP by clicking here](http://www.robportman.com/super_saturday_april?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ssapril3&n=4)! Sincerely, Corry Bliss[
](http://www.robportman.com/?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ssapril3&n=5)Campaign Manager
[](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ssapril3&n=6) [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ssapril3&n=7)[](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ssapril3&n=8)[

](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ssapril3&n=9)
---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ssapril3&n=10). -=-=-

name: Katie McGinty
subject: We're in the lead, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4046629280468172800/96006056802516992?refcode=e20160421.2&refcode2=e20160421.2nd&amount=25)
---
Friend, I wanted to make sure you heard today's great news:

**_A just-released poll has us leading our opponent 37 to 34._**

We've pulled ahead, but we're not out of the woods yet. Our lead is razor-thin, and this is going to be one of the closest Senate primaries in the entire country.

[**I need to know you 're with me. Please, make an urgent $5 donation right now so we can maintain our lead and win on Tuesday.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4046629280468172800/96006056802516992?refcode=e20160421.2&refcode2=e20160421.2nd&amount=25)

I'm so proud of our grassroots campaign to bring new leadership to Washington, and I hope you are too. Together we've surged ahead in recent weeks and closed a double-digit gap against our primary opponent.

I'm counting on you now to make sure we can keep the momentum going and keep fighting together until Tuesday's primary.

[**Contribute $5 or whatever you can right now -- your donation ensures we have the resources to reach out to undecided voters and win on Primary Day next week.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4046629280468172800/96006056802516992?refcode=e20160421.2&refcode2=e20160421.2nd&amount=25)

Thanks, now let's go win this thing!

Katie

clean_body: Friend, I wanted to make sure you heard today's great news: A just-released poll has us leading our opponent 37 to 34. We've pulled ahead, but we're not out of the woods yet. Our lead is razor-thin, and this is going to be one of the closest Senate primaries in the entire country. I'm so proud of our grassroots campaign to bring new leadership to Washington, and I hope you are too. Together we've surged ahead in recent weeks and closed a double-digit gap against our primary opponent. I'm counting on you now to make sure we can keep the momentum going and keep fighting together until Tuesday's primary. Thanks, now let's go win this thing! Katie | | | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate

name: Team Sestak
subject: Fwd: Poll: "Sestak has clear advantages" in Senate race
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171980d/3476a20e/d951465/274278fc/3938696629/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, This morning's _Franklin and Marshall_ Poll gave realization to what the people of Pennsylvania know: "**Congressman Sestak currently has clear advantages** " in the primary only five days away - with _Joe still the frontrunner_ even after the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC) has funnelled in 4.2 million dollars, outspending Joe 2.8 to 1 this last week! | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171980d/3476a20e/d951465/274278fb/3938696629/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0421FB2b1&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
But there is a reason why the people have made it clear that Joe has "clear advantages" for them in this primary:
* A "**deep understanding of government and foreign policy that Katie McGinty and John Fetterman cannot match** " (_The Philadelphia Inquirer_)
* "His **independence, **his**call for accountability **and his**promise to restore integrity** in government" (_Pittsburgh Post-Gazette_)
* "A **fire in his belly and firepower in his resume** " (_Allentown Morning Call_)

[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171980d/3476a20e/d951465/274278fa/3938696629/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0421FB2b2&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
But Joe still has to win against Washington DC's special interests and power brokers ... and you are Joe's true "clear advantage" in doing so. [**Would you please contribute $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or whatever you can to ensure that the people come out on top this Tuesday?**](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171980d/3476a20e/d951465/274278f9/3938696629/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0421FB2p1&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171980d/3476a20e/d951465/274278f8/3938696629/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0421FB2b3&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Respectfully,
Team Sestak
* * *
Peter, **this morning 's Franklin and Marshall Poll has us 6 points up** with only 5 days to the primary - _despite the $4.2 million of Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC) and other outside interest groups ' attack ads!_
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171980d/3476a20e/d951465/274278e7/3938696629/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0421FB2b4&amounts=6,60,600")
---

People are truly tired of Washington DC power politics that considers them irrelevant.
I need you, as DSCC's power is their money and I am now out funded 2.8 to 1 in the homestretch. I am asking you today to sustain our lead by [**contributing now $6, $60, $600 (!) - frankly, whatever you can afford!**](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171980d/3476a20e/d951465/274278e6/3938696629/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0421FB2p2&amounts=6,60,600")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171980d/3476a20e/d951465/274278e5/3938696629/VEsO/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0421FB2b5&amounts=6,60,600")
---

I thank you, so much, for your belief in me ... Thank you for having my 6, so I can have yours!

Warmly,
Joe

name: Sheila O'Connell, Chris Van Hollen for US Senate
subject: BREAKING NEWS: More dishonest ads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| **BREAKING NEWS: One of our opponent's outside SuperPACs just announced another half million dollars to try to stop Chris.**
**[Donate $25 right now to help us fight back>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d2e/70cdc2ba/47d9d539/396cc97/2115146363/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/superpacfinalstretch_cvh?refcode=em42116&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Donate+25+right+now+to+help+us+fight+bac&utm_campaign=em42116_1&source=em42116_1")**
> Friend, I had to reach out. Just one day after the Baltimore Sun endorsed Chris as "the clear choice .. to carry-on the Mikulski tradition in the U.S. Senate", one of our opponent's SuperPACs announced it will spend another half million dollars to try to defeat Chris. **This brings the total outside SuperPAC money against us to over $4.5 million -- including over $1 million from a single hedge fund manager. **
>
> Now we're facing a critical challenge. I need to ensure that we have the resources to defend against their attack ads, which just yesterday the Baltimore Sun called troubling and dishonest.
>
> As Chris's campaign manager it's my job to oversee our campaign's budget in the final stretch. That's why Chris asked me to follow up to see if you can help fund our final media buy deadline before Primary Day.
>
> Unfortunately our opponent has proven she and her SuperPACs will say anything to win -- even the White House called on her PAC to take down their outrageous false attack ad.
>
> **[We need your help, friend to share the truth about Chris's record before voters head to the polls on Tuesday. Are you in? Please use this personalized link so we can get your donation in time >>> ](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d2e/70cdc2ba/47d9d539/396cc94/2115146363/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/superpacfinalstretch_cvh?refcode=em42116&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+We+need+your+help+FIRSTNAMEfriend+to+sha&utm_campaign=em42116_1&source=em42116_1")**
>
> Thank you so much. A gift of any size will help tremendously.
>
> Onward to victory! Sheila O'Connell
> Campaign Manager
> Chris Van Hollen For Senate
>
> | ****[DONATE](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d2e/70cdc2ba/47d9d539/396cc95/2115146363/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/superpacfinalstretch_cvh?refcode=em42116&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em42116_1&source=em42116_1")****
> ---
>
>

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d2e/70cdc2ba/47d9d539/396cc92/2115146363/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em42116_1&source=em42116_1") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. name: Team Sestak
subject: The irony: DSCC defeating ... a Democrat, to elect a Republican?
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719800/3476a20e/d95b840/27427ed5/495765238/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

**" That's $2 million squandered [by DSCC] that now cannot be used against Pat Toomey, no matter who wins," said Jim Burn, former chairman of the Pennsylvania Democratic Party.** Help us correct the error of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee's (DSCC) ways: the Washington, DC establishment effort to spend money to defeat one of their own is _destructive and only helps Pat Toomey_ - especially when they're trying to defeat a champion for Democratic values who has earned the trust of the people. | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719800/3476a20e/d95b840/27427ed4/495765238/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0421FB3b1&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250,500")
---
Why? As one Senator once said, "Joe, you have a reputation for independence, we'll have to work on that."
Peter, that is not the way our government or party should work, and DC power brokers ignore this cornerstone of democracy to their, and our party's, peril.

[Please contribute $5, $15, $25, $50, $100, $500 to help restore a voice that has not been heard in Washington for a while - "we the people's" voice.](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719800/3476a20e/d95b840/27427ed3/495765238/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0421FB3p1&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250,500")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719800/3476a20e/d95b840/27427ed2/495765238/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0421FB3b2&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250,500")
---
Respectfully,
Team Sestak

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Verizon
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers,
The CEO of Verizon makes almost $20 million a year in compensation. He leads one of the most profitable companies in the country.
**Yet Verizon wants to take away employees' health benefits. Verizon wants to outsource decent-paying jobs. Verizon wants to avoid paying federal income tax. And right now, Verizon is refusing to sit down and negotiate a fair contract with its employees.**
In other words, Verizon is just another major American corporation trying to destroy the lives of working Americans. **But this time, Verizon's employees are fighting back.**
Thousands of very brave employees of Verizon and Verizon Wireless are on strike until they can get a fair contract. They made a **very** difficult decision that puts their families at risk -- but it's a choice they made to stand up for justice against corporate greed.
**[I'm asking you today to stand up and tell the CEO of Verizon that you think Verizon employees deserve a fair contract that protects health benefits, guarantees fair pay, and stops outsourcing. Click here to add your name in support of Verizon employees.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/stand-with-verizon-employees?source=em160421-sub-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/stand-with-verizon-employees?source=em160421-sub-full")**
****[Add Your Name»](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/stand-with-verizon-employees?source=em160421-sub-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/stand-with-verizon-employees?source=em160421-sub-full")****
Twice last week in New York City I stood with Verizon workers in the streets. I did so because they're doing something very brave: they're standing up not just for themselves, but for the millions of Americans who don't have a union.
The working class of this country deserves to earn decent wages, decent benefits, and not see their jobs go to low-wage countries.
Verizon's CEO doesn't think that. He called me "contemptible" for saying that his employees need a fair contract, and that Verizon should pay its fair share in federal income taxes.
What I think is contemptible is CEOs with multi-million dollar compensation packages, presiding over extremely profitable companies, and still refusing to give their employees fair contracts.
Corporate greed is a scourge on this country, and it will take all of us standing up for justice in order to rein it in. **One significant way you can stand up to corporate greed is by standing with Verizon employees who are out on strike.**
**[Add your name and say you support Verizon employees who are standing up to the CEO in order to get a fair contract with health benefits, fair pay, and job protections.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/stand-with-verizon-employees?source=em160421-sub-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/stand-with-verizon-employees?source=em160421-sub-full")**
Corporate America is slowly beginning to realize that they cannot have it all. Thanks for helping them know it.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets_go_bernie?refcode=em160421-verizon "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets_go_bernie?refcode=em160421-verizon")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Jared Small, EricGreitens.com
subject: fwd: Join us on Sunday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,
Did you see Austin's note below? Just wanted to email you to make sure you knew to RSVP for the candidates forum in St. Charles on Sunday if you plan to attend.
[Click here to RSVP](http://links.ericgreitens.com/wf/click?upn=gx1vmCW81pIdJ958zAabakVDzy2nY5C2rNUqMCS8al-2BGcvd7iq-2Fx9Zq7DQWFu87w5I24az0qbAnH7SChPsKOZJl8yihaEI2Qu0DbtDXWgGPXfP-2F9CCKZKTOdkgIh79pa8z6Bg9Y8tyQyB0nO-2BWyWUdyZHHdHPzH-2FRzLYl01Bx6M-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpTQr4gRWB75RyMpewKgV8Y5Dq8vmvQfgsXCODy83DGzIixqgKIfkFMfyexGSIjwGPY4BcT3MGRtpISZzi6ET23xZ4JiBvXLwyDTa5PjrB8NOLN4gIIVa1EL2h1ZJDs-2BKnf8isZ34PtEqU2SQ7z4KNp633jVz62JhpinJJ-2B-2BrK39flaD33npzEsvP5lT2ewmXlRX4jIkPsGFHG09N4bRBTn-2F1guJGahpeLFChPCz7m9f0v1W22cA67T23x893DaFX98IcmcAoJgeh-2BOQtkV5YSxkFSv9lFtERTsHZQJpQ-2Bca4n-2BXFcAFNp-2FA1zmy2tEd6Y3DUpYTbA6xuwtDRgBKUV4ZqfvvwWdjFfAGeo0zjq3FuhFAvjARUklPY58eXSXWUAmSNJa3PYukiKJ4Hz0DhLmFaRBe62Lq0Fv9bdC6qoaW9-2FhWNe4iBoooOdVsgaNpy4WBEqPR-2F90q-2B6-2FJ88sMXi96bJ3oW1COf6x-2FXRjHWBneg)
Hope to see you there!
Jared Small
Political Director

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
Austin Chambers, Campaign Manager
Date: Monday, April 18th
Subject: Join us on Sunday
To: Jared Small, Political Director
Jared,
Career politicians are scared of our campaign and its momentum. The success we're earning, the team we're building, and the energy we're creating represents a movement of the people. The political establishment in Jefferson City is doing everything to try to stop us, but it just isn't working!
Last quarter, we raised more money than all of our Republican opponents combined.
The support we've gained shows that Missourians are tired of the status quo. They're frustrated with business-as-usual, and are ready for a conservative outsider to shake-up Jefferson City.
We need your help to continue building this momentum. Eric is participating in a forum at Lindenwood University on Sunday. I hope you'll join us to support him!
**Candidates Forum
Sunday, April 24th**
Please arrive at 5:30 pm
Doors open at 6:00 pm
Lindenwood University in St. Charles
J. Scheidegger Center
2300 West Clay Street
St. Charles, MO 63301

clean_body: Peter, Did you see Austin's note below? Just wanted to email you to make sure you knew to RSVP for the candidates forum in St. Charles on Sunday if you plan to attend. Hope to see you there! Jared Small Political Director \---------- Forwarded message ---------- Austin Chambers, Campaign Manager Date: Monday, April 18th Subject: Join us on Sunday To: Jared Small, Political Director Jared, Career politicians are scared of our campaign and its momentum. The success we're earning, the team we're building, and the energy we're creating represents a movement of the people. The political establishment in Jefferson City is doing everything to try to stop us, but it just isn't working! Last quarter, we raised more money than all of our Republican opponents combined. The support we've gained shows that Missourians are tired of the status quo. They're frustrated with business-as-usual, and are ready for a conservative outsider to shake-up Jefferson City. We need your help to continue building this momentum. Eric is participating in a forum at Lindenwood University on Sunday. I hope you'll join us to support him! Candidates Forum Sunday, April 24th Please arrive at 5:30 pm Doors open at 6:00 pm Lindenwood University in St. Charles J. Scheidegger Center 2300 West Clay Street St. Charles, MO 63301 ! I look forward to seeing you there. On to Victory, AC Austin Chambers Campaign Manager Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer 4579 Laclede Avenue #138 -- St. Louis, Missouri 63108
